name: Curse the Cursor
short_description: An idle game with two opposite modes. --Parker Mode: Do not move your cursor!-- --Nonstop Mode: Move your cursor!-- Customize your game with skins, effects, and backgrounds.
detailed_description:
Step into a small world where your cursor transforms into a 3D cursor. Whether you're a fan of idle games or just like to swing your mouse, Curse the Cursor is for you.

Jump between two opposite gameplay modes:

  • Parker Mode: Test your patience by doing absolutely nothing—just don’t move your cursor. Every second counts!

  • Nonstop Mode: Never stop moving your cursor! Traverse the map with it, covering as much distance as possible.

Enhance your experience with customizable skins, effects and backgrounds. Do not forget that stats you grinded lead your way to the top of the leaderboard.

Go ahead and Curse your Cursor.

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Turkish, Arabic, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Hindi
